title: TypeException after calling UDF in other than sys schema (when it is initialised)
poc: CREATE FUNCTION testing.rad(d DOUBLE) RETURNS DOUBLE BEGIN RETURN d * PI() / 180; END;
key_bug_features: Calling UDF in non-sys schema causes TypeException
